# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_commands:
        description: 'Custom build commands to execute'
        required: true
        type: string
      shell:
        description: 'Shell to use for commands'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - bash
          - sh
          - pwsh
        default: bash

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup shell
        run: |
          if [ "${{ inputs.shell }}" = "pwsh" ]; then
            echo "SHELL=pwsh" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          elif [ "${{ inputs.shell }}" = "sh" ]; then
            echo "SHELL=sh" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          else
            echo "SHELL=bash" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          fi

      - name: Execute custom build commands
        run: |
          set -e
          IFS=';' read -ra CMDS <<< "${{ inputs.build_commands }}"
          for cmd in "${CMDS[@]}"; do
            echo "Executing: $cmd"
            eval "$cmd"
          done
        shell: ${{ env.SHELL }}

      - name: Security scan
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: 'github/security-features'
          path: 'security-features'
          
      - name: Run security checks
        run: |
          # Basic security checks
          if [ -f "package-lock.json" ]; then
            npm audit --audit-level=moderate
          fi
          if [ -f "requirements.txt" ]; then
            pip install safety
            safety check
          fi
        shell: bash

      - name: Validate commands
        run: |
          # Validate that commands don't contain dangerous patterns
          if echo "${{ inputs.build_commands }}" | grep -qE "(rm|chmod|chown|su|sudo|curl|wget|ssh)"; then
            echo "Warning: Potentially dangerous commands detected"
            exit 1
          fi
        shell: bash

      - name: Cleanup
        if: always()
        run: |
          # Cleanup temporary files
          find . -type f -name "*.tmp" -delete
          find . -type f -name "*.log" -delete
        shell: bash
